positive: A minimalist, vector-art illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The central elements include a stylized, glowing crescent moon, interconnected root systems forming abstract shapes, and various bio-luminescent flora (mushrooms, ferns). The color palette must be deep indigo, ethereal teal, glowing pale yellow, and muted forest green. Use clean, thick silhouettes and stark, high contrast against a solid background. The style should evoke modern Nordic folk art and celestial map designs, suitable for screen printing. Composition is centered and symmetrical, focusing on negative space and geometric harmony.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, artifacts, blurry, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, extra limbs
